calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-12-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Lewis Gillian #12355.

Francisco G. Torres, Esq. for Plaintiff: John stewart Company.
Plaintiff's Witness Mark Capestany was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Cynthia Kalt.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 51 Sixth St., #209, San Francisco, CA 94103.
The lease is forfeited.
Back Rent $917.00 and Holdover Damages - $703.92
Costs - $315.00
Total - $1,935.92

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-12-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Renita Mason. Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the Plaintiff.
Defendants Joann Wilbon and Joanne Williams ARE NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of DEC-12-2011 remains on calendar.
